arts.ttl: Fixture amendments for Matchweek 37 Premier League matches
arts.sum: *Subject to Forest's participation in the FA Cup final The list below includes the possible movement of matches involving the teams who will play the FA Cup final on Saturday 17 May, which remains an exclusive matchday with no Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: Man United clash with Chelsea is moved to Friday night BEFORE the FA Cup final - as FA go back on their word
arts.sum: The match at Stamford Bridge was set to take place on Sunday 18 May at 3pm but it has been brought forward to the Friday, kicking off at 8pm.

arts.ttl: Chelsea explored signing Virgil van Dijk before he signed new Liverpool deal, they didn’t pursue for one clear reason
arts.sum: The big news surrounding one of Chelsea’s Premier League rivals on Thursday was the news that Virgil van Dijk had put pen to paper on...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'explored' summer move for Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Chelsea were reportedly exploring a shock summer deal for Virgil Van Dijk, who has recently signed a two-year contract extension with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: 'He's not that guy': Carlton Cole highlights one thing Chelsea star Enzo Fernandez still doesn't have
arts.sum: Even though Chelsea’s form has been majorly inconsistent in 2025, Enzo Fernandez has emerged as a real favourite under Enzo Maresca. It’s a testament to...

arts.ttl: ‘Chelsea in the lead’ – Blues out in front for Champions League star, and could get discount too
arts.sum: Chelsea are currently leading the race for Borussia Dortmund striker Serhou Guirassy and could get him for less than his €70m release clause too. That’s according to Calciomercato.it, who follow up a report from earlier today about Chelsea’s interest and insist they’re very much out in front at this moment in time. They explain that The post ‘Chelsea in the lead’ – Blues out in front for Champions League star, and could get discount too appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea add two players to Enzo Maresca's squad and three debut vs Legia Warsaw in huge changes
arts.sum: After back-to-back draws against Brentford and Ipswich Town - two of the three most winnable games between now and the end of the season, possibly only with the visit of the worst Manchester United side in Premier League history still to come, and even then Chelsea have a poor record in the fixture of late - there is real pressure on. So Maresca can be excused for looking beyond Thursday night's Conference League quarter-final second leg.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's next steps are clear as Blues make Andrey Santos decision ahead of next season - opinion
arts.sum: Many Chelsea fans are excited about the prospect of one of their talented youngsters being a part of the first team squad at Stamford Bridge...

arts.ttl: Report: The response Chelsea got after exploring surprise Liverpool transfer raid
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly explored a surprise transfer deal for Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk, only to find that he was always looking likely to sign a new contract. Van Dijk’s new deal with Liverpool was officially confirmed earlier today, with the Netherlands international putting speculation to bed and committing his future to the Reds.
